title: PPIP - Dialog after Onboarding - UI
scenario: After onboarding, tapping "Continue as Guest" displays a PPIP dialog with "Help us improve your experience" and options "Don't Share" and "Share Data"
expected: A PPIP (Privacy, Performance, Improvement Program) dialog should appear displaying: "Help us improve your experience." followed by a description about collecting basic device and app information (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) for performance and support, noting no personal data is collected or shared with third parties, and that preferences can be changed anytime in Settings. The dialog includes two options: "Don't Share" and "Share Data".
